Simple expressions are accepted
Precedence 1
Parentheses: ( )
Scientific Notation: e/E
Precedence 2
Exponentiation: ^
Precedence 3
Multiplication: *
Integer Division: /
Modulo: %
Precedence 4
Addition: +
Subtraction/negation: −
Operations in the same order of precedence will be evaluated left-to-right (except exponentiation).
